buildCommand: cd ../.. && bun scripts/generate.ts && bun run --filter @repo/web build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud wss://*.convex.cloud https://*.convex.site; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
